It accepts signatures from attesters that are either: - Persistently enabled, OR - In the process of being disabled (still within their delay period) The number of signatures must EXACTLY match either: - The previous threshold (if within threshold change delay period), OR - The target threshold (if no delay or after delay period) The signature parameter should contain concatenated 65-byte ECDSA signatures from valid attesters in ascending order of their addresses.","params":{"hash":"The hash of the data that was signed","signature":"Concatenated signatures from persistently enabled attesters or attesters in the process of being disabled (65 bytes each, count must equal active threshold)"},"returns":{"magicValue":"Returns 0x1626ba7e if the signature is valid, 0xffffffff otherwise"}},"nextSignatureThreshold()":{"returns":{"_0":"The target signature threshold (becomes active immediately if no delay, or after delay period)"}},"numPersistentEnabledAttesters()":{"returns":{"_0":"The number of enabled attesters"}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"pendingOwner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the pending owner."},"persistentEnabledAttesters()":{"returns":{"_0":"An array of persistently enabled attester addresses (does not include attesters in disable delay period)"}},"persistentSignatureBufferDelayBlocks()":{"returns":{"_0":"The number of blocks to delay when disabling attesters and increasing signature thresholds"}},"proxiableUUID()":{"details":"Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier."},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. "license":"Apache-2.0","urls":["bzz-raw://09e9db9aacc7b5fcc1ef4352939e407d4ef1ae750e44deee5d1f12995e8c4f84","dweb:/ipfs/QmSU1wiSqpXczfXdvb25uotVozznvuj28btBReSLAfFJaJ"]},"src/lib/AddressLib.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa0759deee180e754b637d2822befb21b26266350ab69f0b329855ea37befe0f1","license":"Apache-2.0","urls":["bzz-raw://af88e0f869d0e1afba5c92c79ad0c5447ec6733bab4cd513c3eb09a5e29c07b9","dweb:/ipfs/Qmdt6Wjcyw9wnacbUVzDWiC8h5YMuUeVEPm9ui7r2J8g7J"]},"src/modules/remote-domain-depositor/Attestable.sol":{"keccak256":"0x2450b1a7c63923874673499e659fabaf692ec4bd4649cf1aa5fe19ff255a03e6","license":"Apache-2.0","urls":["bzz-raw://29a53261c224f9884728982c9373afd7405ef547c62ef59effb4f2338aa35c35","dweb:/ipfs/QmcNhnWL4qcZRRbXFKMjV7CyxLqLo266mArY7vPNnvR9kQ"]},"src/modules/remote-domain-depositor/DomainManageable.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8b77a348cf21605ba168376515a007eaf12bfedd1fee13b6abb074c2cac76935","license":"Apache-2.0","urls":["bzz-raw://6b979a2430a8e7659ca5a2beeb0964a69f1f9953efa6c3644502400b300697fc","dweb:/ipfs/QmTvq1QHWMYFhHR4cTnrYaDkB1iJYPVCTengVfBzCzkFW9"]}},"version":1}

acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

attesterValidUntilBlock(address).details: This value is only meaningful if the attester is pending removal.      Returns 0 if the attester is persistent, or was never an attester.

returns._0: The block number until which the attester is valid

constructor.details: Disables initializers to prevent the implementation contract from being initialized

disableAttester(address).details: Only callable by domainManager. The attester remains valid for signatures during the delay period. Disabling is not allowed if it would leave fewer than MIN_SIGNATURE_THRESHOLD persistent attesters, or fewer persistent attesters than the target signature threshold.

returns._0: The address of the domain manager
The address of the domain pauser

enableAttester(address).details: Only callable by domainManager. New attester must be nonzero. This function reverts if the attester is already enabled.

params.domainManager_: The address of the domain manager
params.domainPauser_: The address of the domain pauser
params.persistentSignatureBufferDelayBlocks_: The delay in blocks for the persistent signature buffer
params.signatureThreshold_: The threshold of signatures required to attest to a message

returns._0: True if the attester is persistently enabled OR still within their disable delay period, false otherwise

isValidPersistentSignature(bytes32,bytes.custom:security: Signatures must have EXACTLY the target threshold number of persistently enabled attesters
isValidPersistentSignature(bytes32,bytes.details: This function implements stricter signature validation: - Only accepts signatures from persistently enabled attesters (excludes those being disabled, even if within delay period) - Always uses the target threshold (even during a threshold change delay period) - Number of signatures must EXACTLY match the target threshold The signature parameter should contain concatenated 65-byte ECDSA signatures from persistently enabled attesters in ascending order of their addresses.

params.hash: The hash of the data that was signed
params.signature: Concatenated signatures from persistently enabled attesters (65 bytes each, count must equal target threshold)

returns.magicValue: Returns 0x8d3df49d if the signature is valid, 0xffffffff otherwise

isValidSignature(bytes32,bytes).custom:security: Signatures must have EXACTLY the threshold number of attesters - more or fewer will be rejected
isValidSignature(bytes32,bytes).details: This function implements ERC-1271 signature validation. It accepts signatures from attesters that are either: - Persistently enabled, OR - In the process of being disabled (still within their delay period) The number of signatures must EXACTLY match either: - The previous threshold (if within threshold change delay period), OR - The target threshold (if no delay or after delay period) The signature parameter should contain concatenated 65-byte ECDSA signatures from valid attesters in ascending order of their addresses.

params.hash: The hash of the data that was signed
params.signature: Concatenated signatures from persistently enabled attesters or attesters in the process of being disabled (65 bytes each, count must equal active threshold)

returns.magicValue: Returns 0x1626ba7e if the signature is valid, 0xffffffff otherwise

returns._0: The target signature threshold (becomes active immediately if no delay, or after delay period)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

returns._0: An array of persistently enabled attester addresses (does not include attesters in disable delay period)
The number of blocks to delay when disabling attesters and increasing signature thresholds

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setPersistentSignatureBufferDelay(uint25.details: Only callable by owner. This function allows the owner to update the persistent signature buffer delay.

setSignatureThreshold(uint256).details: Updates the signature threshold with a delay period for all changes (increases and decreases). During the delay, both old and new thresholds are valid for signatures. IMPORTANT: After the delay, signatures must have EXACTLY the new threshold number of attesters.

returns._0: The active signature threshold (previous threshold during delay period, otherwise target threshold)
The block number until which the previous threshold remains valid (0 if no delay in progress)

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

updateDomainManager(address).details: This function allows the owner to update the domain manager address,      granting or revoking the domain manager roleThis function should be idempotent

updateDomainPauser(address).details: This function allows the domain manager to update the domain pauser address,      granting or revoking the domain pauser roleThis function should be idempotent

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

attesterValidUntilBlock(address).notice: Returns the block number until which an attester is valid (applicable only if it is pending removal)

isAttesterEnabled(address).notice: Returns whether an attester is valid for signature verification

isValidPersistentSignature(bytes32,bytes.notice: Validates if the provided signature is valid for the given hash using only persistently enabled attesters

isValidSignature(bytes32,bytes).notice: Validates if the provided signature is valid for the given hash

numPersistentEnabledAttesters().notice: Returns the number of enabled attesters

persistentEnabledAttesters().notice: Returns all persistently enabled attesters (excludes those being disabled)

persistentSignatureBufferDelayBlocks().notice: Returns the persistent signature buffer delay in blocks

setPersistentSignatureBufferDelay(uint25.notice: Sets the delay in blocks for disabling attesters and increasing signature thresholds

setSignatureThreshold(uint256).notice: Sets the threshold of signatures required to attest to a message

signatureThreshold().notice: Returns the active signature threshold that will be used for signature validation

signatureThresholdValidUntilBlock().notice: Returns the block number until which the previous signature threshold remains valid
